scripts.type-check: tsc --project tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false | tsc-output-parser | tsx ../../scripts/ts-error-check.ts compare .tscheck.rec.json 'yarn --cwd redisinsight/ui tscheck'
scripts.tscheck: tsc --project tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false | tsc-output-parser | tsx ../../scripts/ts-error-check.ts overwrite .tscheck.rec.json
scripts.tscheck:force: tsc --project tsconfig.json --noEmit --pretty false | tsc-output-parser | tsx ../../scripts/ts-error-check.ts force_overwrite .tscheck.rec.json
